projectDescription: A free, multi-platform app (Android & Windows) for streaming and downloading anime and manga without ads, with optional AniList account sync.
keyFeatures: Stream anime and manga across Android and Windows
Ad-free video playback via direct source parsing
Multiple provider sources with easy switching
AniList OAuth login for favourites and watch progress sync
Auto quality selection for video playback
Automatic app update checks via GitHub releases
publicApiSurface: AnimeHomeViewModel — Popular, Last Updated, Current Season, Trending feeds
EpisodeViewModel — episode listing, provider switching, progress tracking
VideoPlayerViewModel — video playback with source selection
SearchViewModel — full-text anime search across providers
SettingsService — app theme, provider keys, AniList token, episode grid mode
DownloadCenter — queue and manage media downloads
UpdateService — check GitHub releases for new versions
ProfileViewModel — AniList user profile and media list access
